name: CFDI (MX) e-Invoicing
description: Mexico CFDI 4.0 (Comprobante Fiscal Digital por Internet) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into invoice:adapter — sandboxed. Builds a real pre-stamp cfdi:Comprobante and POSTs it to the tenant-configured PAC (Proveedor Autorizado de Certificación), which stamps it (Timbre Fiscal Digital) and returns the SAT UUID. No PAC configured → noop; no UUID is ever fabricated.

settings.label: PAC Endpoint URL
settings.help: HTTP endpoint of your PAC (Proveedor Autorizado de Certificación) that stamps the CFDI. Leave empty to skip submission (noop).

settings.label: RFC Emisor
settings.help: Issuer RFC (tax ID) registered with the SAT.

settings.label: Régimen Fiscal
settings.help: SAT tax regime code of the issuer, e.g. 601. Defaults to 601.

settings.label: Uso CFDI
settings.help: Receptor CFDI usage code, e.g. G03 (gastos en general). Defaults to S01.

settings.label: Método de Pago
settings.help: SAT payment method: PUE (one-time) or PPD (instalments). Defaults to PUE.

settings.label: Forma de Pago
settings.help: SAT form of payment, e.g. 99 (por definir) or 03 (transfer). Defaults to 99.

settings.label: Régimen Fiscal Receptor
settings.help: Receptor tax regime code (CFDI 4.0 requires it), e.g. 616. Defaults to 616.

secrets.label: PAC Bearer Token
secrets.help: Optional bearer token for the PAC endpoint; injected host-side, never seen by the plugin.
